data.title: Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)
data.description: Monitors and analyzes activity across the network for suspicious behavior.
data.technical_spec: Splunk and custom threat intelligence solutions.

data.title: Data Encryption Strategies
data.description: Strong encryption protocols are implemented to safeguard user data both in transit and at rest.

data.title: Privacy by Design
data.description: Embedded privacy practices to ensure compliance with global data protection regulations.
data.technical_spec: GDPR and CCPA compliance, data anonymization.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: MFA is implemented across user accounts to add an extra layer of security.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent audits for vulnerabilities and compliance checks.
